ROOM 503-A JUDGE PROTEM: DENNIS HYDE; CLERK: E.ESTACIO C/C FOR SETTLE MENT CONFERENC. PLTF PRESENT W/ CNSL K.MARTINEZ. DEFT J.OGG PRESENT,IN PROPER.JURY DEMAND STRICKEN AS TO DEFT THOMPSON. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. JURY TRIAL DATE OF 1-24-00 REMAINS.
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 218

C/C FOR TRIAL BY COUNT IN DEPT 218, LNORRIS, JUDGE; FHENTON, CLERK; BYEE, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY SMCDONALD, ESQ. DEFS JACK OGG AND RICHARD HIGGINS APPR IN PRO PER. PRIOR TO TRIAL SETTLEMENT IS REACHED. PLNTF WAIVES ALL RENTS AND PER DIEM DAMAGES FROM 1 DEC 99 - 15 MAR 00 IN EXCHANGE FOR DEFENDANTS VACATING BY 15 MAR 00. PLNTF TO PAY $2500 TO DEFS AS MOVING EXPENSES IF TERMS COMPLIED WITH. IF NOT, PLNTF MAY SEEK EX- PARTE JUDGMENT FOR $1000 DAMAGES.
